content:
# Seismic Tomography

**Summary**: A method to map the Earth's interior by analyzing variations in seismic wave speeds.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-kesumastuti|Kesumastuti, 2025]] used seismic-tomography to map 3D velocity structures and identify subducting slabs.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Seismic tomography can be based on body-wave or surface-wave travel-times, with teleseismic tomography (TET) being used to probe deeper structures like the upper mantle. ([[2025-kesumastuti|Kesumastuti, 2025, p. 27]])
